titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 736

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=982 status=draft modified=2022-01-20 17:35:55.822284+00 | translation moa=983 status=draft modified=2022-09-07 14:04:19.327748+00

div.p:
Reuerendo domino . A . Dei gratia Illustri Regi scottorum . P . filio . Domini . P . Comitis de dunbar suus fidelis et
deuotus . Salutem . et debitum in omnibus famulatum . Regie excellentie uestre significo me resignasse et omnino quietam
clamasse deo et beato Cuthberto et Monachis Dunelmensibus apud coldingham deo et sancte Marie et beato Cuthberto
et sancte Ebbe seruientibus villulam quandam que uocatur Suinewde quam antecessores mei

iniuste quam debuerant detinuerunt et ocuparuerunt sicut per cartam illustris regis Edgari perpendi quam . T . prior
de Coldingham mihi ostendit et fideliter perlegit et ius beati Cuthberti super eadem uillula plenarie de
monstrauit . Hinc est quod regiam Excellentiam uestram attentius deprecor quatenus diuine pietatis intuitu
et ob amorem et reuerentiam gloriosi confessoris Cuthberti quem antecessores uestri semper speciali amore di
lexerunt . illam dicto et beato Cuthberto et predictis monachis confirmare uelitis . valeat et vigeat excellentia
uestra in domino

To the respected A(lexander) by the grace of God king of the Scots, P(atrick), son of the lord P(atrick) earl of Dunbar, his sworn and loyal man, sends greeting, and duty and service in all things. I indicate to your royal excellency that I have resigned and entirely quitclaimed to God, blessed Cuthbert, and the monks of Durham serving God, Saint Mary, blessed Cuthbert and Saint Ebbe, at Coldingham, a small estate which is called Swinwood, which my ancestors

which they had owed, they withheld and appropriated, as it is to be examined through the charter of the illustrious King Edgar which T(homas), prior of Coldingham, showed to me and faithfully read through, and fully demonstrated the right of blessed Cuthbert over the same estate . Hence it is that I earnestly pray your royal excellency that moved by godly love and on account of love and reverence for the glorious confessor, Cuthbert, whom your ancestors ever loved with a special love, you be minded to confirm that (charter) to God and blessed Cuthbert and the aforesaid monks. Health and life in the Lord to your excellency!
